Measure your wrist with a flexible tape or string for best results.

settings.content_4:
Your bracelet is built to last but a little care goes a long way:

Daily wear: Shower swim and exercise — no need to remove
Cleaning: Wipe with soft cloth and warm soapy water
Storage: Store in the included gift box when not wearing
Avoid: Harsh chemicals like bleach or acetone

settings.q1: Will it turn my skin green or tarnish?
settings.a1: No. This bracelet is made from 316L stainless steel with 18K gold PVD plating. It is tarnish-resistant and corrosion-proof. It won't turn green fade or lose its shine even with daily wear.
settings.q2: Can I wear it in the shower or swimming?
settings.a2: Yes. The stainless steel construction and PVD coating make it fully waterproof. You can shower swim and exercise without ever taking it off.
settings.q3: Is it safe for sensitive skin?
settings.a3: Absolutely. It is 100% hypoallergenic — nickel-free and lead-free. Designed specifically for people with metal sensitivities.
settings.a4: The bracelet is 17cm with a 5cm extension chain so it adjusts to fit wrists from 17cm to 22cm. This covers most wrist sizes from S to XL.
settings.q5: What is the difference between Gold and Silver?
settings.a5: Both are made from the same 316L stainless steel. Gold has an 18K gold PVD plating with warm gold tones. Silver has a high-polished chrome finish. Both are equally durable and tarnish-resistant.
settings.a6: It is one of our best-selling gift items. The infinity love knot symbolizes eternal love and connection — perfect for anniversaries birthdays Valentine's Day Mother's Day or bridesmaid gifts. Comes in premium gift-ready packaging.
settings.q7: How does it compare to designer jewelry?
settings.a7: Similar infinity knot bracelets from designer brands cost $175-$400. This bracelet uses the same 316L stainless steel and delivers the same premium look and durability for under $25. The difference is the brand name not the quality.
settings.a8: We offer a 30-day no-questions-asked return policy. If you are not completely satisfied send it back for a full refund. Free shipping on all US orders.
